world_name: Legend of the Five Rings - Rokugan
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Legend of the Five Rings / Rokugan inspired Japanese feudal fantasy atlas for the terrain type single_continent.
Scene/backdrop: one huge primary continent of samurai clan provinces surrounded by misty seas, celestial mountain ranges, Shadowlands corruption along the southern border, castle districts, sacred forest groves, elemental spirit realms beyond the veil, rice plains, shrine roads, imperial capital region, clan mon crests as decorative symbols and cherry blossom valleys.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated Rokugan-style atlas, Japanese feudal fantasy, parchment and ink wash cartography, elemental rings aesthetic, cherry blossom atmosphere, honor and duty, subtle kami spirit glow.
Composition/framing: tall portrait atlas view, single continent fills most of the vertical frame with surrounding seas and small offshore fragments; include compass seal, elegant border, province boundary shading, castle icons, shrine symbols, clan crest-like ornaments and mountain pass marks without readable text.
Geography constraints: large world map crossing many climates and biomes; complex realistic coastline with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, capes, deltas, misty estuaries and varied landforms; include snowy sacred peaks, temperate forests, rice plains, deserts, wetlands, volcanic lands, sacred groves, spirit-haunted valleys and corrupted Shadowlands.
Avoid: western medieval fantasy, modern satellite image, simple oval continent, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
